description: Use this API to return N-terminal dc line model starting array indices and status. This API routine was first introduced in release 31.0.0. ierr, ival = dcnmind(name, string)

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: String indicating the n-terminal dc line model quantity desired. (input).

string.description: Number of CON values used by the model.
Number of STATE values used by the model.
Number of VAR values used by the model.
Number of ICON values used by the model.

Bypassed flag: 0 = bypassed; 1 = not bypassed. Does not reflect dc line status. For a model to be called during simulations the dc line must be in service the model’s bypassed flag must be not bypassed.

error_codes.description: dc line not in network but in model tables; ‘IVAL’ returned.
dc line not in network or in model tables; ‘IVAL’ unchanged.
No model in model tables; ‘IVAL’ unchanged.
Model does not use any of this data type; ‘IVAL’ = 0 returned.
Dynamics data not present in working memory; ‘IVAL’ unchanged.
